name: Etsy sellers processing 5–15 invoices/month tool
description: For Etsy sellers processing 5–15 invoices/month, late payments cause cash flow gaps. We automate dunning emails instead of manual tracking of payments and sending reminders.

locked_fields.mvp_wedge: For Etsy sellers processing 5–15 invoices/month, late payments cause cash flow gaps. We automate dunning emails instead of manual tracking of payments and sending reminders.
locked_fields.current_alternative: Manual tracking of payments and sending reminders
